feedback.text: I'm kind of lazy and in writing moment newly awoken with limited time before I must go to work, but I want this legislation to also tackle the big problem of games being shut down by publishers, especially after being sold to consumers effectively as a good, with no end-of-life plans or patches to make it playable from a client-side state. Basically what the Stop Killing Games movement is asking for; it's too huge a consumer problem to leave it out in my view. Thanks!
